pr.title: Record: 11L Muon TTT + Entropy-Adaptive Epochs (8×H100) — val_bpb 1.1179 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Test-time training replaces SGD with Newton-Schulz Muon updates and gates 2/3/4 epochs per chunk based on entropy to concentrate adaptation on harder validation content.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT loop adapts model weights on validation chunks during the score-first regime rather than training-data updates.
techniques: Newton-Schulz Muon optimizer in the TTT loop
